reviews.review_description: I play this game a fair bit on my vr, and I think it’s a decent game, BUT it would be way better if you added an online option and maybe even a career mode. If that happens I would say this game was a 11/10  game.

reviews.review_title: Don't buy if your Left Handed - Edit
reviews.review_description: I reviewed my complete bank statement now (blaming Meta for this 100%) The left handed option is functional on your game.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, thank you for leaving a review.

We are very sorry to hear about your frustrating experience with the refund process and the lack of left-handed support, but it seems there might be a mix-up with another VR golf app.

First, EnonoGolf is completely free to play right now. We do not charge $6.99 CAD, so you would not have been billed by us. This is likely why you cannot find our app in your Meta purchase history to request a refund.

Second, EnonoGolf does fully support left-handed players. We have designed our game so that both right- and left-handed golfers can enjoy the courses.

Because of the price and the left-handed issue you mentioned, we strongly believe you intended to review a different game. We kindly ask you to double-check the name of the app you purchased.

Since EnonoGolf is free and supports left-handed play, we would love for you to actually give our game a try!

reviews.review_title: Couldn’t get it to work with attachment
reviews.review_description:
I have a yezro weighted club attachment which is the closest to a real club but unfortunately I couldn’t get this app to recognise it so had to uninstall. 

Following the recent update it now supports my attachment, thanks developer. Driver is now close and usable but other clubs, particularly irons, are off so not sure if needs additional adjustment but if the attachment was configured correctly it shouldn’t?
I was scrolling for a game and saw this. Has everything you would need. Putting needs a good amount of work but fun game.

reviews.review_title: I have a weighted club and works...
reviews.review_description: Just fine. I wish the game makers will update with new courses. The game is a good golf game not a lot of extras and some finishing touches need to be done. But a quick 9 or 18 just fine.
Putter was way to sensitive@ - ball went miles with just a gentle tap. Where as the other clubs didn't go far enough no matter how hard you swing.

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing EnonoGolf and leaving your review! The sensitivity of the putter and the distance of the other clubs is actually a big topic of discussion within our team right now, and we are continuously working on adjustments. We truly appreciate your valuable feedback to help us improve!

reviews.review_description: Seriously, the features are amazing. Pretty accurate. Graphics are enough because my god the swing analysis and data is pretty spot on. 3d printing an attachment for an old club and going to try it out. For free, you couldn’t ask for more.

I think this game is really good. I saw a review saying you need only a driver. That is really stupid because there is definitely other people that will want the other clubs. I have a lot of fun with this game.

Pretty good but why all the the unnecessary clubs like all I want is a driver for putting and all, it is to confuzling Please fix this, I do like the mini games though because of the driver, also the driver has very god grips and bearly misses the ball it is crazyyyy, anyways I play golf everyday at my local country club so I knowable you need is a driver #Welovethedriverrr

Guys, there has never been a golf experience that I would recommend using to improve your real life striking, until now. The other golf "games" are geared for all ages and walks of life, meaning the trajectory, swing angle of attack, distance, rpm, etc. Has been modified to give exceptional results as to where your shot ends. This simulator i would recommend for accurate results. The distance is within 6 or 7 yards on a driver, which is impressive. Even more so, the accuracy of spin, distance, and trajectory. I've never used a simulator under 25k that does what this one is guatent4e to do. How its free blows my mind. Graphics aren't the goal here, its about forming and building correct form and angle of attack. Use this if you have low handicaps.
Nice

This game is very well made and fun! You have everything from custom assists, custom club position, auto putting (I don't know why you woild want that), mini-games and more than decent graphics!   
I think it is very underrated. The only bad part I see is only three cources at this time.

reviews.review_title: Very Good but Still Some Glitches
reviews.review_description:
I think the physics behind this game is very good. For a free game the graphics are good but there seems to be glitches if you are a ‘leftie’ like me.
The driver doesn’t work e.g on the driving range it still thinks I’m right handed (any left handed swing goes backwards into the fence), but it does go forwards on the course around 130 yards.The 3w goes 240- 250 yards both on the range and on the course which makes me think there is a glitch with the driver. The other clubs seem to all go appropriate distances. I am a golfer of 50 years and can report the physics are great, tracking a golf swing plane which I know to be spot on my plane. The distance to the pin seems to be glitching too but I think it relates to the driver problem.
If these things can be fixed this could be a great game.
YOU MUST PLAY. The game is the best game. The graphics are amazing and it is really fun. I got in trouble for playing this game to much. So amazing. You must try it. 5 Stars

Hittting is super unrealistic when I putt I barely touch the ball and it goes flying my game does not load half the time it feels like the creators of this game put no thought into it ￼they should pay you money to play this game
Nice game, great for practice like in the range

reviews.review_title: This is the best free golf game on VR
reviews.review_description:
if you can’t afford golf+ or golf5 this is a ￼really good ￼game to try out￼ and ￼￼practice in￼ and I like how there’s a camera that shows your swing it’s really useful for getting to know how to play and ￼improve even if you never played real golf it gets you on the grind to improve so if you actually play real golf or wanna play it just improve at your game if you play ￼￼￼golf it’s a good game and they have all the clubs and I like how the tracking camera ￼track your swing in real life ￼￼plus there’s a driving range putting practice and courses ￼and there’s golf mini￼￼ games ￼￼it’s like ￼having the golf daddy￼ for free ￼ but in VR ￼ the only bad parts I see ￼￼￼are the fact there aren’t a public mode where you can go against people and voice chat so rather than the fact that if they don’t update the game it will go dead this is a good game if you don’t wanna pay $30 for golf+ or $15 for golf5 plus some courses you have to pay money for in golf+ and other golf games or if you don’t wanna spend money on anything like real courses if you play golf in real life ￼so I give it 4 stars ￼just for ￼￼￼￼not having ￼multiplayer mode ￼but I do hope they update it but play it ￼ if you’ve been wanting a VR golf￼ game for free i’m telling you it’s the best free golf game out there go get it￼￼￼
￼
It would be nice to see more golf courses rather than just 2 plus one downloadable one

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback.

Currently, the app includes two courses available by default, plus one additional course that can be added via download. We encourage you to try the downloadable course if you haven’t already.

In addition, we are actively considering adding more golf courses as DLC (downloadable content) in the future, so that users can enjoy a wider variety of courses.

Thank you very much for your valuable suggestion. We truly appreciate your support and will continue working to improve the app.

reviews.review_description: Could use some improvements but for free I have zero complaints
Good
The Golf VR offer photo-realistic courses. There are many options. There are still kinks to be worked out; for example, too often the club will Not meet the ball.
Love this game.  I play everyday to keep myself moving.  Hope more courses will be added.

It's really realistic and really fun there are no bugs as faeas I have seen and free is ever better so yeah 1 thing I would recommend is multiplayer to say like play a hole with your friends ALSO: If you make a multilayer do not add strength boost or club size as when I put it on max I could hit almost 400 yards with a driverd it would be broken
Make more tournaments that you can play against bots but it is really fun
Unrealistic boring and awful menu
The menu is extremely unintuitive.  I found myself stuck in menus that seem to have no way out of.  Every time I enter the game it forgets my custom club position as well.

developer_response.body: Sorry for the lack of taste, UI/UX requires a lot of expertise and costs a lot of money. We hope you understand.

reviews.review_description: I’m left handed and it started me out right handed so I switch to left hand and it didn’t work please fix it is super hard to hit the ball but everything else is fine just please fix this

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback!
We’re sorry to hear that you're having trouble with the left-handed setting.

If you're left-handed but using the right-hand controller, that’s totally fine.
Just go to the bottom of the main menu screen, and you’ll see an option to set your dominant hand. Please switch it to left-handed—this changes how your swing is handled in-game, even if you're still using the right-hand controller.

We’ll continue improving the experience. Thanks again for your input!

reviews.review_description: It’s free definitely underrated overall 10/10
As the title says, this game needs mixed reality in the driving range! Would love to blast the ball in my garden.
If you want a cheap option for a golf game on VR this game will do,but if you want something more realistic the I would not recommend this game
This was a very good game for 1.00 I have been playing non stop i recommend
It was pretty good the distances can be a little wack but overall it wasn’t bad especially for free
This game is great me and my dad love it keep it up!!
Pls make a multiplayer for this game
Ultra realistic and very good physics
Very good game but I want to be able to play with my mates so 4 stars
My game stopped working but when it was working it was pretty fun
Good game
I love the game
